name: New Zealand Easter Spice Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together and use when required.
2. Combine sugar, flour, and spice mixture in a bowl. Add the salt.
3. Rub in the cubed cold butter until the mixture forms a firm dough.
4. Rest the dough in the refrigerator for 24 hours.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface and cut into desired shapes and sizes.
6. Bake at 160°C (320°F) for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool on baking racks.
8. Sprinkle with icing sugar if desired.
9. For Easter strawberry shortcakes, place halved strawberries and whipped cream between two biscuits. Stack them and top with a plain biscuit.
